name: Malores
description: The Holy Maloresian Empire. Home to the Imperial Capital of Aquilae. The Maloresian Empire stands as the beacon of hope for mankind. Built on a hatred for the mutant, and the sorcerer. Innovation is Malores, from towers of marble, to garden cities built upon the ruins of the old world. The Church of Mendorf, controlled by the all powerful Pope, leads its witch hunters to snuff out any and all Maleficarum. However the Empire in all it’s might cannot seem to control the Borderlands. Their last hope lies within the walls of the Borderlands Keep. The lone mountain castle controlled by Castellan Brown. Bombarded constantly creatures created by the power of the Violet sky. Will you help push back against the horror?

name: Malores
description: The Maloresian colonies east of the Borderlands.

name: The Borderlands
description: The wild frontier between Malores and Urden. Lawless and dangerous, home to adventurers, monsters, and mutants. This is where most of our adventures take place.

name: Urden
description: The Magocratic Empire of sorcerers. Ruled by the Sorcerer King from the floating palace of Zenfaeron. Urdish citizens will always be able to become Mages, and it is generally frowned upon to choose another occupation. The Urdish pride themselves on natural talent over working hard. They see those with calloused hands, and muscular frames as weak. For what is weaker than having to try. They usually have elaborate names. For example Zarlykorthon the 5th Prince of Urden who rules over XOR has what would be considered a very proud Urdish name.

name: Jungles of Ur
description: Dense and treacherous jungles filled with ancient ruins and dangerous creatures.

name: Osmia
description: Homeland of the cursed Osmian people. Plagued by an eternal violent storm. All Osmians are born albino with pale red eyes.

name: Khalida
description: Under the rule of the Caliphate, Khalidians generally believe that magic, or anything from the stars for that matter, are the trash of the gods; and must be destroyed. Khalidians live in a Theocracy, with strict moral rules. It is not uncommon however to see Khalidians secretly practicing magic, as servants to their Caliph. Not to mention the unmatched Khalidian Pirates who roam Firnum.

name: Far Lands
description: To the distant south of the continent, the Far Lands are filled with Samurai, Ninja, Oni, Ogres, Yokai, and all manor of spirits. Folks from these lands are generally seen as exotic, and most know nothing about them. Perhaps you are from the Plains of Azüle, or the great city of Mythryndyr.

name: Angel City
description: The island city of silvery glass towers in the Lake of Dreams. Home to the Perfect Being and protected by 100-foot tall Kaiju Archangels.
